title: Touchpad freeze on Latitude 7430
symptom: Touchpad becomes unresponsive after sleep/wake cycle
root_cause: Synaptics driver conflict with Windows 11 23H2 update
resolution: Update Synaptics driver to v19.5.35.81 and disable Windows Precision Touchpad
workaround: Hard reboot or use external mouse

title: Port flapping on Catalyst 9300
symptom: Ports 12-14 show link up/down every 30-60 seconds
root_cause: Suspected SFP module degradation or cable fault on uplink
resolution: Replace SFP module in port 12 and reseat patch cables

title: Recurring paper jam in tray 2
symptom: Paper jams every 20-30 pages from tray 2
root_cause: Worn pickup roller in tray 2 assembly
workaround: Use tray 1 manual feed as temporary workaround

title: Server closet overheating — Austin
root_cause: Blocked air intake vent and HVAC schedule not covering after-hours
resolution: Cleared vent obstruction and extended HVAC to 24/7 for server closet

title: macOS Sonoma WiFi drops
symptom: WiFi disconnects intermittently after macOS Sonoma 14.3 update
root_cause: Known Apple bug in WiFi roaming between APs with WPA3
resolution: Update to macOS 14.4+ which includes fix
workaround: Toggle WiFi off/on or forget and rejoin network

title: USB-C dock not detecting displays
symptom: External monitors not detected when laptop connected via USB-C dock
root_cause: Dock firmware outdated — known issue with DisplayPort alt-mode on WD19S
resolution: Flash dock firmware to v01.00.20 using Dell Dock Updater
workaround: Disconnect and reconnect USB-C cable or use direct HDMI

title: WiFi dead zone in Dublin conference room
symptom: No WiFi coverage in Conference Room 1 (DUB-CR-1)
root_cause: AP placement too far from room — signal attenuated by glass partition
resolution: Install additional U6-LR AP in hallway adjacent to conference room

title: Phishing email campaign targeting staff
symptom: Multiple staff report suspicious emails impersonating IT helpdesk
root_cause: External phishing campaign using spoofed sender addresses
resolution: Blocked sender domain at mail gateway and notified all staff
workaround: Report and delete suspicious emails — do not click links
